codeReview.summary: The fix commit addresses both prior blocking findings. In cli_utils.py, tool_ms is no longer hardcoded and is now attributed when the previous parsed step is a tool_use event. In latency-investigation.md, the conclusions were reconciled by explicitly identifying secondary API calls timing out against NVIDIA as the root cause, adding a dedicated nvidia-inference-proxy analysis section, and updating Recommended Fix with the requested three options plus the OAuth v2.1.89 and claude-code-router notes.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The debug-worker procedure marks reading `.factory/library/architecture.md` as part of instrumentation workflow, but the fix transcript skeleton completed successfully without an architecture read. Either this step is optional in practice or the skill should clarify which reads are strictly required.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill file `.factory/skills/debug-worker/SKILL.md` instrumentation step 1 requires architecture review; transcript skeleton for workerSessionId `f66625a5-c607-4454-9398-398c5dabbdfc` shows reads of mission/validation/features, cli_utils.py, and latency-investigation.md, but no architecture.md read.

summary: Reviewed the fix feature transcript skeleton and the diffs for per-step-timing-instrumentation, analysis-and-conclusions, and fix-tool-ms-and-reconcile-conclusions. The two prior blocking issues are addressed, so this fix review passes.
